title: ononis angustissima subsp. paralias
intro: Ononis angustissima subsp. paralias, also known as the Spiny Restharrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its high content of anthraquinones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ononis angustissima subsp. paralia include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Ononis angustissima subsp. paralia can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to be used in herbal medicine, although its use should be guided by a qualified practitioner due to potential side effects and interactions.
